name: rendering-example
description: Example of the different Solid render modes (string SSR, streaming SSR, client-only)
author: Ryan Carniato

scripts.string:build: vite build --config string/vite.config.mjs --outDir dist/client && vite build --config string/vite.config.mjs --ssr entry-server.tsx --outDir dist/server
scripts.stream:build: vite build --config stream/vite.config.mjs --outDir dist/client && vite build --config stream/vite.config.mjs --ssr entry-server.tsx --outDir dist/server
